provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
This endpoint is an open SSRF proxy. Required changes:
- Enforce a scheme allowlist (http/https only).
- Resolve DNS once, pin the IP, and reject private ranges and the metadata IP 169.254.169.254.
- Cap redirects and re-validate every hop.
- Never forward internal responses verbatim to the client.
